type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment:
Yearly variations in the allocation of fuel  between Compressors and other
fuel-gas combustion equipment with different CO and NOx emission factors causes variability in the total CO and NOx emissions.

fuel-gas combustion equipment with different CO and NOx emission factors causes variability in the total CO and NOx emissions.
